evidences.title: ET to UTC Converter - Time.now
evidences.content: EDT 9:00 AM → UTC 1:00 PM EDT 5:00 PM → UTC 9:00 PM 4-hour difference during summer International Coordination EST Midnight → UTC 5:00 AM EDT Midnight → UTC 4:00 AM UTC used for global scheduling Technical Applications Server logs → UTC timestamps API calls → UTC standards UTC preferred for technical systems #### Conversion Tips & Best Practices • Add 5 hours to EST (winter) or 4 hours to EDT (summer) to get UTC • UTC is the preferred standard for international business, aviation, and technical applications • UTC is also known as "Zulu Time" in military and aviation contexts • For practical purposes, UTC and GMT are the same, though UTC is the modern standard • Always use 24-hour format when expressing UTC time (no AM/PM) [...] #### What is ET to UTC Conversion? ET to UTC conversion helps you translate time between Eastern Time and Coordinated Universal Time. ET encompasses both EST (UTC-5) and EDT (UTC-4) used on the U.S. East Coast. UTC is the global time standard that never changes and serves as the reference for all world timezones. The time difference varies between 4-5 hours. #### Time Zone Information Eastern Time (ET): Generic term encompassing EST (winter) and EDT (summ...

evidences.title: Extract Historical Data from Binance Using Python | Medium
evidences.content: from binance.client import Clientimport pandas as pdimport datetime# Binance API credentialsapi_key = 'your_api_key'api_secret = 'your_api_secret'client = Client(api_key, api_secret)# Define the symbol for BTC/USDT pairsymbol = 'BTCUSDT'# Define custom start and end timestart_time = datetime.datetime(2024, 3, 15, 0, 0, 0)end_time = datetime.datetime(2024, 6, 15, 0, 0, 0)klines = client.get_historical_klines(symbol=symbol, interval=Client.KLINE_INTERVAL_1MINUTE, start_str=str(start_time), end_str=str(end_time))# Convert the data into a pandas dataframe for easier manipulationdf_M = pd.DataFrame(klines, columns=['Open Time', 'Open', 'High', 'Low', 'Close', 'Volume', 'Close Time', 'Quote Asset Volume', 'Number of Trades', 'Taker Buy Base Asset Volume', 'Taker Buy Quote Asset Volume', [...] ``` symbol = 'BTCUSDT' 'BTCUSDT' ``` We can set a custom start and end time for our function by parsing the date to date time format. ``` # format (year, month, day, hour, minute, second)start_time = datetime.datetime(2024, 3, 15, 0, 0, 0)end_time = datetime.datetime(2024, 6, 15, 0, 0, 0) # format (year, month, day, hour, minute, second) 2024 3 15 0 0 0 2024 6 15 0 0 0 ``` `datetime.datetime`: Cr...

You just need to select the data and time of the source time zone and the tool will calculate the date and time for the destination time zone. ## How To Use Select a date by using the "Date" option. Select a time by using the "Time" option. Click button "Convert" to calculate. The calculation results will be displayed in table. ## Remarks [...] Converter supports daylight saving time (DST) or summer time, if the target location is currently using DST time zone, converter will automatically calculate and display local summer time. [...] Based International Air Transport Association (IATA) timezone codes. Time zones use hours and minutes offset from Coordinated Universal Time (UTC), most a whole number of hours, a few are offset by 30 or 45 minutes.
